home.ctaHeadline:
Get a real cash offer
in 60 seconds
home.ctaA11y: Sell your car — get an instant valuation
home.howStep1Body: Every car passes our Behbehani 200-point inspection before listing.
home.howStep2Body: Refundable 48-hour hold while you finalise finance or test drive.
home.howStep3Body: Pick up at any showroom or home delivery anywhere in Kuwait.

accepted.confirmSub: You'll receive a call at your registered number to confirm the next steps.
accepted.confirmText: Behbehani Motors will contact you within 24 hours to schedule pickup.
accepted.step1Desc: Our team calls to confirm the pickup date and location — no need to bring the car to us.
accepted.step2Desc: Inspector collects the car and completes the ownership paperwork on the spot.
accepted.step3Desc: transferred within 2–3 business days after handover.

counter.notesPlaceholder: Why this number? · Recent service, new tires, full options...
counter.reviewInfo: BMC will review and respond within

declined.cardText: If you change your mind, contact us by WhatsApp — we may be able to re-issue the offer at the same or a similar price.
declined.heroSub: You chose not to accept this offer.
declined.noteText: Behbehani may also send a new offer if market conditions change. Keep an eye on your notifications.

expired.cardText: Don't worry — Behbehani may re-issue at a different price. Request a new inspection or contact us and we'll see what we can do.

view.heroSub: Based on the Behbehani Motors inspection completed Mon, 19 May.
view.retry: Pull to refresh, or come back later.

view.termsDeclineBody: closes the offer. By accepting you agree to the

cancel.errorRaceBody: Refreshed to the latest status — cancellation is no longer available.

hero.subSchedule: Three minutes. We'll come to you within 24 hours.

address.title: Where should we come?
address.sub: Your inspector arrives at your address.
address.parkingToggle: Add parking instructions or gate code
address.parkingPlaceholder: e.g. Gated compound, call at the gate. Parking inside.

schedule.title: When works for you?
schedule.sub: Pick a day and rough window. Our team confirms within 24h.

contact.title: Who should we contact?
contact.privacyText: Your details stay private until you accept an offer. We never share with third parties.

step3.terms: I agree to the inspection T&Cs and consent to Behbehani Motors processing my booking details.

whatHappensNext.title: What happens next
whatHappensNext.bullet1: Our team confirms your slot within 24 hours.
whatHappensNext.bullet2: Inspector arrives, does 71-point check + photos (~30 min).
whatHappensNext.bullet3: You receive a cash offer within 24 hours of inspection.

confirmation.smsNote: We'll confirm your inspector visit by SMS within 30 minutes.
